label: 第163話
source_locator: 単行本19巻 目次 p.27
summary_short: 甘井は虎杖を日車のもとへ案内し、麗美は伏黒を日車ではなくレジィ一派の罠へ誘導する。二人はそれぞれ異なる敵へ近づく。
summary_full: 甘井は、仙台で不良に従っていた自分を虎杖が救った過去を思い出しながら、虎杖を池袋の劇場へ案内する。虎杖は浴槽に入った日車を発見する。一方、麗美に案内された伏黒は、日車ではなくレジィ・スターの一派と対面する。麗美が最初から囮だったと悟った伏黒は、津美紀を救うためなら他の泳者を殺す覚悟もあると告げる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: 悠仁 and 凛 have met once before in an encounter the former doesn't recall. In the present day, 凛 hopes to make up for his actions by helping 悠仁 find 日車寛見 . 恵 is escorted by someone as well, but 麗美 leads him into a confrontation with another player named レジィ instead.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: 悠仁 stopped the bullies while 凛 stood idly by. Sometime in the past in 仙台市 , 凛 甘井 and another student were approached by bullies. 凛 didn't stand up to the aggressors, but he knew how to act so the bullies wouldn't get agitated so they would quickly stop bothering him. He laughed and went with what the bullies said while the other student was more or less just confused. The other student wasn't aware of how to do the same and 凛 expected more from him even though he never tried to help. 凛 knew the bullies were arrogant despite not being smart or athletic so he focused on staying out of their way. He always smiled and went with the flow even at other people's expense because nobody would bother him and good things would sometime happen to him. However, in that same instance, someone much different refused to sit by and watch someone else get bullied. 凛 thought another moron showed up who wouldn't know how to avoid trouble, but it turned out to be the Tiger of West Junior High. The bullies attempted to beat up on the newcomer but all three of them were knocked out by a single hit each, shocking 凛. The Junior High student turned to 凛 and asked what about him, but 凛 was heavily intimidated and could barely respond. In the present day, the two of them are registered as 死滅回游 Players: 虎杖悠仁 and 凛 甘井. 死滅回游 Players: 虎杖悠仁 & 凛 甘井. Currently, 恵 and 麗美 get off at Kahamecho Station and the former immediately expresses some concerns. He doesn't think it's wise to go through 池袋 toward 新宿 because supplies are plentiful and it's more likely they encounter other players. He believes they should've taken a more direct route to 新宿 but 麗美 argues she has two reasons for heading through 池袋. The route is simple for her and she has a base nearby where she wants to rest and bathe at. " She fooled ya. ♡ " Meanwhile, 凛 takes 悠仁 to a theater in 池袋 that 日車 uses as his base. Excited to have quickly located his target, 悠仁 thanks 凛 and gets ready to head inside. Concerned, 凛 asks if 悠仁 is really going inside and 悠仁 replies that he's in a hurry to meet up with an ally. 凛's never met 日車 personally but he's beaten 羽場 badly in the past. This doesn't shake 悠仁's confidence because he didn't find 羽場 to be that strong and assures 凛 he'll be able to escape if anything goes wrong. 悠仁 happily skips off into the theater while 凛 laments sitting idly by unable to say something. 凛 apologizes to 悠仁 as the latter heads inside the theater. 悠仁 descends some stairs into the building is surprised by what he sees. Someone who isn't 日車 introduces himself as レジィ, but he's not greeting 悠仁. 恵 has walked into an ambush in 麗美の "base" where another player was waiting for him. レジィ reveals 麗美 tricked him, immediately inciting 恵's rage. 恵 looks back at 麗美 with an intensely irritated look but she isn't intimidated because she's confident in レジィ. She tries to taunt him but 恵 tells her to shut up and summons 玉犬: 渾 , stating that they're wasting his time. 悠仁 finds 日車 in a bizarre state of mind. What surprises 悠仁 upon entering the theater is 日車 sitting in a bathtub filled with water while he's still fully clothed. 日車 claims it feels better than he expected. 日車 explains that he doesn't care anything anymore so he's trying stuff he never thought he would before. He adds that he's basically someone in their thirties going off their rails and asks if that's funny. 悠仁 finds this kind of funny but tries to get straight to the point. He asks 日車 to talk but the lawyer claims it costs five thousand yen every half hour. 日車 refutes this as just a joke because he wanted to play the part of the greedy lawyer for once. 悠仁 feels something is off about 日車 and realizes he's not an incarnated sorcerer from the past. Since 日車 was a normal person before becoming a sorcerer, 悠仁 believes they can communicate and make a deal. 悠仁 reveals that he and his allies want to negate the 死滅回游 and asks to use 日車's points to add a rule. 日車 refuses to let 悠仁 use his points. 日車 declines because he believes the 死滅回游 presents possibilities he's interested in. He's disillusioned with society's law and wants to know more about the rules of the 死滅回游 in comparison. 日車 presents the question of what if the 死滅回游 punished rule-breakers without charges, prosecutions, or trials. 日車 thinks something like that would be ideal even though he recognizes the rules of the game aren't perfect. He still wants to preserve the basic mechanics of the game and see the 術式 removal process for himself. 悠仁 tries to tell 日車 that the 死滅回游 is a ritual for sacrificing everyone in Japan but Higiruma doesn't believe that. The lawyer points out the 死滅回游's rules celebrate permanence, something 悠仁 can't argue because he doesn't really understand it. Running out of options and patience, 悠仁 decides to rephrase and demands that Higiruma let him use his points. 日車 defiantly stands up out of the tub and asks 悠仁 if he's ever killed someone who's angering him. Armed with a gavel in hand and his 式神 by his side, 日車 claims that it also feels better than expected.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 凛 甘井 虎杖悠仁 伏黒恵 麗美 羽場 (言及のみ) レジィ・スター 日車寛見 家入硝子 (回想)
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 仙台市 (回想) 東京第1結界／池袋
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 伏黒恵の術式 十種影法術 術式 玉犬: 渾 玉犬: 渾／式神 ジャッジマン

key_events_verified_phase9: 甘井が仙台で虎杖に救われた過去を回想する
虎杖が日車を発見する
伏黒がレジィ一派の罠へ誘導される
伏黒が死滅回游で他者を殺す覚悟を示す
verification_notes_phase9: 集英社公式18～20巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別・話別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第九段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
